tools.name: get_cfr_section
tools.description: Retrieve the full text of a specific FDA regulation section from the Code of Federal Regulations. Returns the regulatory text for clinical trial protocol compliance. Example: get 21 CFR 312.23 for IND content requirements.

part.description: CFR part number (e.g., 312 for IND, 50 for human subjects, 56 for IRB)

section.description: Section number within the part (e.g., 23 for 312.23). Omit to get entire part.

tools.name: search_cfr
tools.description: Search FDA regulations (21 CFR) for specific terms or concepts. Returns matching sections with snippets. Use for finding relevant regulatory requirements when you don't know the exact section number.

part.description: Limit search to a specific part (e.g., 312)

tools.name: get_cfr_part_structure
tools.description: Get the table of contents and section structure of a CFR part. Useful for understanding what regulatory sections exist before retrieving specific ones.
